name: Flat Bench Cable Fly
aliases: Cable Lying Fly, Flat Bench Cable Fly
shortDescription: A chest isolation exercise using cables while lying on a flat bench for continuous tension.
instructions: Lie on a flat bench positioned between two low cable pulleys. Grab the handles with arms extended and a slight bend in the elbows, then bring your hands together in a wide arc before returning to the start position.
steps: Set a flat bench between two cable pulleys and attach handles.
Lie back and grip each handle with arms extended.
With elbows slightly bent, bring handles together above your chest.
Squeeze your chest at the top.
Slowly return to the starting position with control.
breathing: Exhale as you bring hands together, inhale as you return.
